sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71621" key="chro/sarkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξηρό-σαρκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71621.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dry of flesh,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0664.tlg001:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diocl.Fr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">135</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
